title: derris scabricaulis
intro: Derris scabricaulis, also known as the "Padaal" or "Derris", is a type of flowering plant in the pea family that is native to tropical Asia. The plant contains rotenone, a toxic compound with medicinal properties, which has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Derris scabricaulis include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic properties, making it effective in reducing pain, swelling, and infection. Derris scabricaulis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and ointments, which are used to treat various ailments, although its use should be cautioned due to its toxicity and potential side effects.
